text.title: PM 1:1 Template (Engineering / Design) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply PM 1:1 Template (Engineering / Design) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: block-calendar
step.action: Book biweekly recurring 30-min slot per teammate.

step.name: create-notes-log
step.action: Create per-person doc; pin section anchors.

step.name: run-1on1
step.action: Cover 5 sections in order; capture verbatim quotes where possible.

step.name: quarterly-trend-scan
step.action: Scan for recurring blockers + career signals; adjust template.
